how_it_works: The Pantheon is a system of divine powers you equip through the NPC Sin in any town. You unlock Major Gods by defeating them in the campaign. Minor Gods are unlocked automatically as you progress. Upgrade each god's powers by placing a Divine Vessel in the Map Device alongside the specific map, killing the boss, then returning the captured soul to Sin.
divine_vessel_note: Divine Vessels are purchased from Sin for 5 Chaos Orbs each. One is consumed per capture. Each upgrade unlocks one additional power for that god. Most gods have 2 upgrade tiers available.
tips: You can only have one Major God and one Minor God active at a time — swap freely for free.
Soul of Arakaali is the go-to Major God for chaos/bleed/poison defences and life regeneration recovery.
Soul of Lunaris scales with nearby enemies — powerful in dense maps; weak in boss fights.
Soul of Solaris is better in boss fights — very strong against single-target with the upgrades.
Soul of Shakari (Minor) with the Whipping Miscreation upgrade gives 50% chance to avoid Poison — a very strong defensive choice.
Soul of Tukohama (Minor) gives significant physical damage reduction while stationary — great for totems, miners, and trap builds.
Soul of Ryslatha (Minor) refills all Life Flasks when they are empty — excellent flask sustain in maps.
Swap Minor Gods to counter specific mechanics: Yugul vs. Reflect maps, Garukhan vs. degeneration, Ralakesh vs. bleed.

major_gods.name: Soul of the Brine King
major_gods.unlock: Defeat the Brine King (Act 6 — The Tidal Island)
base_powers: You cannot be Frozen if you've been Frozen recently
25% reduced Effect of Chill on you

upgrades.power: 50% reduced Effect of Chill on you
You cannot be Stunned if you've been Stunned recently

major_gods.notes: The most common choice for general mapping. Prevents chain-freezes and repeated stuns. Upgraded version with stun immunity is especially valuable in HC.

major_gods.name: Soul of Lunaris
major_gods.unlock: Defeat Lunaris (Act 8 — The Blood Aqueduct or Phase Transition)
base_powers: 1% additional Physical Damage Reduction for each nearby Enemy, up to 8%
1% increased Movement Speed for each nearby Enemy, up to 8%

upgrades.power: 8% additional Physical Damage Reduction if you have been Hit Recently

major_gods.notes: Scales with enemy density — excellent in juiced maps. Weak during boss fights where few enemies are nearby. Best paired with Lunaris for clearing content.

major_gods.name: Soul of Solaris
base_powers: 6% additional Physical Damage Reduction while there is only one nearby Enemy
20% chance to take 50% less Area Damage from Hits

upgrades.power: 6% reduced Elemental Damage taken if you have been Hit by a Unique Enemy Recently
50% chance to avoid Ailments while there is only one nearby Enemy

major_gods.defensive_use: Single-target physical reduction, elemental reduction, ailment avoidance
major_gods.notes: Best Major God for boss fights — the 'one nearby enemy' condition is always met during pinnacle encounters. Upgraded Ailment avoidance is very strong against bosses that apply Shock, Chill, or Ignite.

major_gods.name: Soul of Arakaali
base_powers: 5% reduced Damage taken from Damage Over Time
10% chance to Recover 10% of Maximum Life when you stop taking Damage Over Time

upgrades.power: Recover 5% of Life when you Block a Chaos Damage Hit
50% increased Recovery Rate of Life and Energy Shield if you have stopped taking Damage Over Time Recently

major_gods.defensive_use: Chaos DoT reduction, Life recovery from DoT
major_gods.notes: Excellent for content with heavy DoT threats (Delirium, Blight, Poison bosses). The 50% increased recovery rate upgrade is extremely strong — virtually doubles effective recovery when DoT is cleared.

minor_gods.name: Soul of Abberath
base_powers: Unaffected by Burning Ground
5% reduced Fire Damage taken

upgrades.power: 60% less Duration of Ignite on you

minor_gods.defensive_use: Fire DoT immunity, Ignite duration reduction
minor_gods.notes: Burning Ground immunity makes certain map mods trivial. Useful on fire-resistant builds but rarely the best overall Minor God.

minor_gods.name: Soul of Gruthkul
base_powers: 1% additional Physical Damage Reduction for each Hit you've taken Recently, up to 5%

upgrades.power: Melee Attackers take 10 Physical Damage on Hit

minor_gods.defensive_use: Physical Damage Reduction scaling with incoming hits
minor_gods.notes: Provides up to 5% physical reduction that stacks with Lunaris. Good for melee builds or builds that take many small hits.

minor_gods.name: Soul of Yugul
base_powers: You take 50% reduced Reflected Damage
Enemies Reflected Damage is Unlucky
minor_gods.notes: Essential for any build running Reflect maps that still can reflect to the character. The base power effectively makes reflect non-lethal on properly geared characters.

minor_gods.name: Soul of Shakari
base_powers: You cannot be Poisoned while there are at least 3 Poisons on you
20% less Chaos Damage taken over Time
minor_gods.notes: One of the most powerful defensive Minor Gods. The 50% avoid Poison upgrade (Whipping Miscreation capture) makes Poison maps and chaos environments much safer. Popular in Hardcore.

minor_gods.name: Soul of Tukohama
base_powers: While Stationary, gain 3% additional Physical Damage Reduction every second, up to 9%

upgrades.power: While Stationary, Regenerate 0.5% of Life per second

minor_gods.defensive_use: Stationary physical reduction and life regen
minor_gods.notes: Strong for builds that stand still: Totems, Mines, Traps, and some Spellcaster builds using cast-while-channelling. Up to 9% physical reduction is very meaningful at high armour values.

minor_gods.name: Soul of Garukhan
base_powers: 6% increased Movement Speed if you haven't been Hit Recently
20% chance to Evade Attacks if you haven't been Hit Recently
minor_gods.defensive_use: Evasion and movement speed when not recently hit
minor_gods.notes: Good for Evasion builds that successfully avoid hits. The movement bonus is a quality-of-life upgrade for fast-moving builds. Synergizes with Elusive and Phase Acrobatics.

minor_gods.name: Soul of Ralakesh
base_powers: Moving while Bleeding doesn't cause you to take extra Damage
25% reduced Physical Damage over Time taken while moving
minor_gods.defensive_use: Bleed safety while moving, bleed avoidance
minor_gods.notes: Essential for fast-moving builds in Bleed-heavy content. The base power alone removes a major danger (moving while bleeding normally triples bleed damage). The avoidance upgrade is a bonus.

minor_gods.name: Soul of Ryslatha
base_powers: Life Flasks gain 3 Charges every 3 seconds if you haven't used a Life Flask Recently
40% increased Life Flask Effect Duration

upgrades.power: Life Flasks are refilled when they run out if you haven't been refilled this way in the past 3 seconds

minor_gods.defensive_use: Flask charge sustain and emergency refill
minor_gods.notes: One of the strongest defensive Minor Gods for life-based builds. The upgrade provides an automatic Life Flask emergency refill — effectively a free panic button once every 3 seconds.
